perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens on a brightly lit stage during the day where a male and female host in colorful outfits point at the crowd while standing behind a transparent lottery box filled with tickets. (2) The scene cuts to a large crowd of people cheering and waving, followed by a large outdoor LED screen displaying colorful cartoon animations related to the event. (3) Transitions show the venue (Lihpao Resort) at night with a large Ferris wheel in the background; performers in vibrant, polka-dot costumes dance on stage while the crowd holds red crab-shaped light sticks. (4) Close-ups of children in the audience singing along and wearing themed hats and costumes. (5) A dramatic fireworks display lights up the night sky over the resort buildings. (6) The video concludes with the hosts back on stage, the female host appearing tearful and emotional while they both wave goodbye to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic male and female vocals are heard counting and shouting enthusiastically in Mandarin over an upbeat, fast-tempo pop backing track. (2) The audio shifts to include loud, synchronized crowd cheering and the ambient noise of a large outdoor gathering. (3) High-pitched singing from performers on stage is layered with rhythmic percussion from the BGM. (4) Loud, booming sound effects of fireworks exploding are heard clearly during the night montage. (5) In the final segment, the female host's voice becomes shaky and emotional with audible sobbing and sniffing between words as she speaks into the microphone, accompanied by gentle piano and crowd applause.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '2025 haha baby 擁抱點點路跑 RUN' - Decorative/Hook title of the event. (2) 'Apple iPhone 15 Pro', 'Apple Watch S9' - Functional text identifying prize categories held by staff on stage. (3) '這種體育課真好玩' - Functional subtitles translating the animated character's speech. (4) '謝謝所有參與我們大集合的大家' - Functional closing subtitle expressing gratitude.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Daytime stage activities -> High-energy performance montage -> Emotional night-time conclusion.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main hosts (Cai A-ga and Ga Sao), multiple performers, and a large audience of hundreds.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male host wears a yellow and white vest with a headband; the main female host wears a colorful polka-dot dress with pigtails.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features a large outdoor stage with metal scaffolding, a massive LED screen, a colorful Ferris wheel (Lihpao Resort Sky Dream), and various commercial buildings in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed (Bright daylight and vibrant neon stage lights at night).

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Activity Highlights -> Emotional Peak -> CTA/Gratitude
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a high-energy recap of a fan-centered event called 'Haha Baby Run'. It aims to celebrate the success of the event, showcase the brand's community engagement through prizes and performances, and strengthen the emotional bond between the influencers (Cai A-ga's family) and their followers by showing vulnerability and sincere gratitude at the end.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: On-stage display of Apple products as lottery prizes and constant display of 'Haha Baby' brand logos.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The pigtail hairstyle and polka-dot outfits are signature looks for the 'Haha Baby' brand aesthetic.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video heavily relies on the 'idol-fan' dynamic, utilizing high-production event footage and emotional close-ups to maintain audience loyalty.
